name: ChatGPT
description: The leading conversational AI chatbot with multimodal capabilities, plugins, and a massive ecosystem.
longDescription: ChatGPT by OpenAI is the most widely used AI chatbot in the world. It offers natural language conversation, code generation, image analysis, and a vast plugin ecosystem through the GPT Store. Available in free and paid tiers, it serves hundreds of millions of users worldwide.
bestFor: General-purpose AI assistant for writing, coding, research, and creative tasks

name: Claude
description: AI assistant with emphasis on safety, advanced reasoning, and the largest context window in the industry.
longDescription: Claude by Anthropic excels in deep reasoning, document analysis, and following complex multi-step instructions. With a 200K token context window, it can process entire books and codebases. Known for being helpful, harmless, and honest.
bestFor: Complex analysis, long documents, coding projects, and tasks requiring careful reasoning

name: Gemini
pros: Native multimodal from the ground up
description: Google's multimodal AI with deep ecosystem integration, massive context window, and native image generation.
longDescription: Gemini is Google's flagship AI model, built to be multimodal from the ground up. It integrates seamlessly with Google Workspace, Search, and other Google products. Features the largest context window at 1M tokens.
bestFor: Users deep in the Google ecosystem who need multimodal AI with search integration

name: Midjourney
pros: Best image quality in the market
description: The leading AI image generator known for stunning photorealistic and artistic output quality.
longDescription: Midjourney is widely regarded as the highest-quality AI image generator available. It excels at creating photorealistic images, artistic illustrations, and creative visual content. Originally Discord-based, it now offers a web editor for more streamlined workflows.
bestFor: Artists, designers, and content creators who need the highest quality AI-generated images

name: DALL-E 3
description: OpenAI's image generator with the best text rendering and seamless ChatGPT integration.
longDescription: DALL-E 3 by OpenAI is integrated directly into ChatGPT, making it the most accessible AI image generator. It excels at understanding complex prompts and rendering text within images accurately.
bestFor: Users who want quick image generation within ChatGPT without a separate subscription

name: GitHub Copilot
cons: Can be slow on large projects
description: AI coding assistant integrated directly into your IDE with smart autocomplete and chat capabilities.
longDescription: GitHub Copilot is Microsoft's AI-powered coding assistant that integrates into VS Code, JetBrains, and other IDEs. It provides intelligent code completion, chat-based coding help, and automated PR reviews.
bestFor: Professional developers who want AI assistance directly in their existing IDE workflow

name: Cursor
cons: VS Code fork may lack some extensions
description: AI-native code editor that revolutionizes software development with agent mode and multi-file intelligence.
longDescription: Cursor is a VS Code fork built from the ground up for AI-assisted coding. Its Agent mode can handle complex multi-file tasks autonomously, while Composer enables large-scale refactoring with AI guidance.
bestFor: Developers who want the most advanced AI-native coding experience with autonomous capabilities

name: Perplexity
description: Answer engine combining web search with conversational AI, always backed by real-time citations.
longDescription: Perplexity AI is a search-first AI tool that combines the power of large language models with real-time web search. Every answer comes with citations, making it ideal for research and fact-checking.
bestFor: Researchers, students, and professionals who need accurate, sourced answers quickly

name: Runway ML
description: Professional AI video generation and editing suite with industry-leading Gen-3 Alpha model.
longDescription: Runway ML is the leading AI video generation platform, used by Hollywood studios and content creators alike. Gen-3 Alpha produces remarkably realistic video from text prompts.
bestFor: Filmmakers, content creators, and video professionals who need cutting-edge AI video tools

name: ElevenLabs
description: Leading AI voice and audio platform with ultra-realistic text-to-speech and voice cloning technology.
longDescription: ElevenLabs produces the most realistic AI-generated speech available. Their voice cloning technology can replicate any voice with just a few minutes of audio, while their TTS engine supports 29+ languages.
bestFor: Content creators, podcasters, and businesses needing professional AI voice generation

name: Suno
description: AI music generator that creates complete songs with vocals, instruments, and lyrics from text prompts.
longDescription: Suno AI can generate complete songs including vocals, instruments, and lyrics from simple text descriptions. It supports a wide range of musical genres and styles.
bestFor: Musicians, content creators, and hobbyists who want to create original music without production skills

name: Jasper
cons: Limited outside of marketing use cases
description: AI marketing platform for creating brand-aligned content at scale with team collaboration.
longDescription: Jasper is designed specifically for marketing teams, offering AI copywriting with brand voice consistency, SEO optimization, and team workflow management.
bestFor: Marketing teams and agencies that need consistent, on-brand content at scale
